DRAFT CONTRACT

Between: Test Corporation (Buyer)
And: [Supplier Name] (Supplier)

1. Term: 12 months from signing date.
2. Payment: 30% upon signing, 40% upon delivery, 30% upon acceptance.
3. Warranty: 2 years from acceptance date.
4. Liability: Limited to contract value. No consequential damages.
5. Termination: 30 days written notice by either party.
6. Governing Law: Laws of the contracting jurisdiction.
7. Dispute Resolution: Arbitration in accordance with ICC Rules.
8. Confidentiality: 5 years from contract date.
